headline: GE HealthCare (GEHC) Q4 2024 Earnings Transcript
summary: Now, two years into our journey, I'm pleased to say that we're continuing on the path of strong execution with our fourth quarter results.  In China, we're beginning to see a slight improvement in the market evidenced by orders growth.  In addition, sales and orders grew mid-single-digits excluding China in the fourth quarter.
